_comment: Pre-baked fallback image library. When fal.ai is unreachable for 3+ consecutive frames, the kiosk picks a random image from the journey's bucket below so the visualizer stays alive instead of freezing on the last frame. Drop pre-rendered JPGs/PNGs into /public/installation-fallback/<journey-id>/ then list their public paths under the matching journey-id key. Empty bucket = no fallback for that journey (kiosk will freeze on last frame as before).
